CORPSE.title: Corpse
CORPSE.description:
Temporary cards that provide passive benefits.
Obtained by killing enemies. They have [gold]Integrity[/gold] levels, which determine the effectiveness of the [gold]Corpse[/gold] (divided into [gold]Intact (75%+)[/gold], [green]Damaged (50%+)[/green], [blue]Broken (25%+)[/blue], and [purple]Ruined (0%)[/purple] corresponding to [gold]100%[/gold], [green]50%[/green], [blue]25%[/blue] effectiveness; [gold]Corpses[/gold] with [purple]Ruined[/purple] [gold]Integrity[/gold] cannot be obtained).
Unless otherwise specified, [gold]Corpses[/gold] will [green]rot[/green].
INTEGRITY.title: Integrity
INTEGRITY.description: Each time you deal damage to an enemy, Integrity decreases by [blue]1%[/blue]. Special: If a single instance of damage exceeds [blue]25%[/blue] of the enemy's Max HP or if damage is caused by [gold]Ignite[/gold], it decreases by [blue]5%[/blue] instead.
ROT.title: Rot X
PREVENT_ROT.title: Preservative
PREVENT_ROT.description: This [gold]Corpse[/gold] will not be [gold]Removed[/gold] due to [green]rotting[/green].
IGNITE.title: Ignite
IGNITE.description: At the start of your turn, lose HP equal to the [gold]Ignite[/gold] stacks, then increase the stacks by [blue]1[/blue].
WRAITH.title: Wraith
WRAITH.description: Whenever you deal damage to an enemy, consume [blue]1[/blue] stack and make the enemy lose an additional [blue]4[/blue] HP.
